title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Surgeon based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories International Enterprises!
